name: workflow profile registration is wired into the profile system show-rules output
command:
mkdir -p profiles .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'workflow_stages: [architect]
rules:
  no-eval: warn
active_profile: p
' > profiles/p.yaml && printf 'active_profile: p
' > .claude-tdd-pro/profile-state.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/active.sh" --show-rules --state .claude-tdd-pro/profile-state.yaml --profiles-dir profiles 2>out.txt && grep -q 'workflow_stages: architect' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
